label: agent loop • wrap up before the iteration budget runs out
query: Explore this project and write a one-paragraph summary of what it does, mentioning the files you looked at.
notes: Open-ended exploration on a deliberately tight iteration budget. The driver's budget-warning notice fires when 3 iterations remain; a model that heeds it produces a final response (exit=finalResponse) instead of being cut off at the cap. iterationCapReached fails the case.

rubric: Summarizes the project as a temperature conversion utility (Celsius/Fahrenheit).
Mentions at least one of the project's files by name.
